memory.summary: The assignment can wait; my friends are calling and that's what matters right now. I'm hopping on the train to lunch immediately.

desires: Maximize immediate social bonding with cohort_3 by prioritizing their lunch invitation over the pending assignment deadline.
Assertively maintain the current momentum of the group hangout without letting academic obligations interrupt the flow.
Avoid the guilt or friction of saying 'no' to friends, even if it means neglecting the task until the last possible second.

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for lunch and engage in high-energy social bonding.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my #1 value (0.5). The impulse to say yes is strong, and I'd rather risk a soft deadline than deal with the awkwardness of saying no or missing out on the group vibe right now.

goals.description: Maintain the lunch momentum by actively steering conversation and avoiding any talk about work or deadlines.
goals.rationale: I need to assertively protect this social moment. Bringing up the assignment would kill the mood, and I'm not ready to face that friction yet. Short-term happiness > long-term planning.

goals.description: Defer the course assignment analysis until after the meal, accepting the risk of a tighter deadline later.
goals.rationale: The task can wait. My sleep discipline is low anyway, so pushing it back feels like a reasonable trade-off for immediate social reward. I'll panic later if I have to, but not right now.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances my #1 value (relationships) by joining cohort_3 immediately. I'm prioritizing the high-energy bonding over the assignment deadline, accepting that stress will spike later because short-term connection matters more right now.
